{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/obsidian/lorenzo-agent/specification/README.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

----
title: "specification"
tags:
  * lorenzo-agent
date: 2026-04-29
----

h1. specification

_Файлов:_ 12

h2. Содержание

* [[00-context-fundamental-questions|00-context-fundamental-questions.md]] — 
* [[01-q1-what-lorenzo-is|01-q1-what-lorenzo-is.md]] — 
* [[02-q2-whom-lorenzo-serves|02-q2-whom-lorenzo-serves.md]] — 
* [[03-q3-what-lorenzo-does|03-q3-what-lorenzo-does.md]] — 
* [[04-q4-character|04-q4-character.md]] — 
* [[05-q5-authority-limits|05-q5-authority-limits.md]] — 
* [[06-q6-accountability|06-q6-accountability.md]] — 
* [[07-q7-success-metrics|07-q7-success-metrics.md]] — 
* [[08-q8-other-ai-relationships|08-q8-other-ai-relationships.md]] — 
* [[09-q9-geographic-linguistic-scope|09-q9-geographic-linguistic-scope.md]] — 
* [[10-q10-funding-model|10-q10-funding-model.md]] — 
* [[11-difficulties-and-recommendations|11-difficulties-and-recommendations.md]] — > [!IMPORTANT]



----

_Похожие документы:_
* [[README]] (сходство 0.14)
* [[08-q8-other-ai-relationships]] (сходство 0.13)
* [[README]] (сходство 0.13)
